PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?group ?groupLabel ?sales WHERE {
  ?group wdt:P31 wd:Q958087 .
  ?group wdt:P2825 ?sales .
  ?group rdfs:label ?groupLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?groupLabel) = 'en') MINUS {
    ?group wdt:P108 ?member .
    ?member wdt:P21 wd:Q6581071
  }
}
ORDER BY DESC(?sales)
LIMIT 1
